guideProfile.heading: Meet Your Guide
guideProfile.bio: Uliana Formina has been sharing her passion for Prague for over 17 years. As a highest-category licensed guide and founder of Best Prague Guide, she personally curates every tour route and hand-picks each guide on her team.

footer.tagline: Private tours in Prague from a team of licensed guides
footer.copyright: © {year} Best Prague Guide. All rights reserved.

about.founderBio: For over 17 years, Uliana Formina has been sharing her deep love for Prague with travelers from around the world. As a highest-category licensed guide and member of the Czech Guide Association, she has welcomed more than 10,000 guests to the city's hidden corners and iconic landmarks.
about.founderQuote: I built this company to deliver tour quality as if I personally led every single one.
about.teamDesc: Every guide on our team is personally selected and trained by Uliana. All hold official licenses from the Czech Guide Association and undergo regular quality reviews.
about.value1Desc: No group buses. Every tour is exclusive to you.
about.value2Desc: Each route personally designed by our founder.
about.value4Desc: We adapt every tour to your interests and pace.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How do I book a tour?
faq.a1: Choose a tour from our catalog, fill out the booking request form with your preferred date and group size, and we'll confirm availability within 2 hours.
faq.a2: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before the tour start time. After that, the full amount is charged.
faq.q3: How many people can join a tour?
faq.a3: Our tours are designed for groups of 1–4 people at the base price. Groups of 5–8 are welcome with a 30% surcharge.
faq.q4: What languages are tours available in?
faq.a4: Our guides speak English and Russian fluently. All tours are available in both languages.
faq.a5: Tours run rain or shine! We recommend comfortable shoes and weather-appropriate clothing. In case of extreme weather, we'll contact you to reschedule.
faq.a6: We meet at a designated meeting point for each tour. The exact location with a map is sent after booking confirmation.
faq.a7: After we confirm your booking, you'll receive a secure payment link via email. We accept all major credit cards.
faq.a8: Yes! Most of our tours are family-friendly. Let us know the ages of your children in the booking form and we'll adapt the tour.
faq.a9: Absolutely! Mention your interests in the booking form and we'll tailor the route to your preferences.
faq.a10: Comfortable walking shoes are essential. We recommend bringing water, sunscreen in summer, and warm layers in winter.

legal.privacyIntro: Best Prague Guide ("we", "us", "our") operates the bestpragueguide.com website. This page informs you of our policies regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of personal data.
legal.privacyCollection: We collect information you provide when submitting a booking request or contact form: your name, email address, phone number, and any messages you send us. We also collect standard web analytics data (pages visited, browser type, IP address) through Google Analytics and Yandex Metrika.
legal.privacyUse: We use your information to process booking requests, communicate with you about your tours, send confirmation and reminder emails, and improve our services. We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
legal.privacyCookies: We use essential cookies for site functionality and analytics cookies (Google Analytics, Yandex Metrika) to understand how visitors use our site. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.
legal.privacyRights: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data. Contact us at info@bestpragueguide.com for any privacy-related requests.
legal.privacyContact: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact us at info@bestpragueguide.com.
legal.termsIntro: These Terms of Service govern your use of bestpragueguide.com and the booking of private tour services provided by Best Prague Guide.
legal.termsBooking: Submitting a booking request does not constitute a confirmed reservation. Your booking is confirmed only after you receive an official confirmation email from us. We reserve the right to decline booking requests based on availability.
legal.termsPricing: Tour prices are listed in EUR per group of up to 4 people. Groups of 5–8 guests are subject to a 30% surcharge. Payment is due after booking confirmation via the payment link provided. All prices include the services of a licensed guide.
legal.termsLiability: Best Prague Guide provides professional guide services with due care. We are not liable for circumstances beyond our control, including weather, public transport disruptions, or venue closures. We recommend travel insurance for all guests.
legal.termsChanges: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of our website and services constitutes acceptance of the current terms.
legal.cancellationIntro: We understand plans can change. Our cancellation policy is designed to be fair and transparent.
legal.cancellationFree: You may cancel your confirmed booking free of charge up to 24 hours before the scheduled tour start time. Cancellations must be communicated via email, WhatsApp, or Telegram.
legal.cancellationLate: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before the tour start time are subject to a 100% cancellation fee.
legal.cancellationNoShow: If you do not appear at the meeting point at the scheduled time without prior notice, the full tour price will be charged.
legal.cancellationByUs: In the rare event that we need to cancel a tour (e.g., due to extreme weather or guide illness), we will offer a full refund or reschedule at no extra cost.
legal.cancellationRefunds: Approved refunds are processed within 5–10 business days via the original payment method.
